rulings.Case Title: LINDA HUF-NOVOA et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Judgment On The Pleading
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT HAL-MAR-JAC ENTERPRISES, INC. Motion For Judgment On The Pleading GRANT-JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, NOVOA-HUFF AND LUMPKIN.NO OPPOSITION. GRANT-JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AS TO CRAWFORD RE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS TO DEMONSTRATE JOINT EMPLOYMENT. DENY- JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS RE CRAWFORD AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION. DENY-SLAPP MOTION TO STRIKE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW SUIT UNDER CCP425.16(E). (302/REQ/PB)
